entry.title: New: BILL074(25) (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
RELATING TO ORDINANCE REVISION.

Repeals certain outdated, obsolete, or unnecessary provisions deemed unconstitutional due to judicial findings, including provisions governing campaign contributions and campaign assistance from lobbyists, vehicular advertising, and lessors property interests relating to renegotiation of lease rents for residential owner-occupants.

Latest action: Passed first reading.

View on the council site
